refunds.empty: You have not submitted any refund requests.

dialog.incompleteDescription: This paid order is not complete. Your full refund request is approved automatically and cannot be rejected by an administrator.
dialog.completedDescription: Completed-order claims submitted within 14 calendar days after payment are reviewed under the Refund Policy.
dialog.originalMethod: Approved refunds are issued in full to the original payment method.

evidence.title: Supporting evidence
evidence.help: Up to 5 PNG, JPEG, or PDF files; 5 MB each.
evidence.maxFiles: A claim may contain at most 5 evidence files.
evidence.invalidFile: Use a PNG, JPEG, or PDF file no larger than 5 MB.
evidence.uploadFailed: Evidence could not be securely uploaded.

public.title: Report an Unauthorized Charge
public.description: Verify your email before providing minimal transaction details. The result remains neutral whether or not an order can be matched.
public.codeSent: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email. It expires in 10 minutes.
public.doneMessage: If the information can be verified, the claim will be reviewed and we will contact you by email.

errors.verify: The code could not be verified.

marketingUnsubscribe.description: This stops optional marketing email. Service, security, payment, and order messages are unaffected.

privacyRequests.title: Privacy Requests
privacyRequests.description: Submit and track requests to access, export, rectify, delete, restrict, or object to processing of your personal data.
privacyRequests.passwordHint: Used only for in-memory identity verification; it is not stored.
privacyRequests.deadlineNote: Target response deadline: 28 days after identity verification.

accountPrivacy.title: Privacy Center
accountPrivacy.description: Review policy acceptance, synchronize browser choices across signed-in devices, and manage privacy requests from one place.
accountPrivacy.gpcDescription: GPC is applied after account and browser choices. Advertising and data sharing remain off and cannot be enabled.
accountPrivacy.advertisingUnavailable: Advertising and data-sharing choices are unavailable and remain off.
accountPrivacy.choicesDescription: Signed-in choices are synchronized by category only. Valbri never uploads concrete localStorage or sessionStorage values.
accountPrivacy.preferencesDescription: Remember language and interface choices on this browser.
accountPrivacy.functionalDescription: Enable device-local review voting and related functions.
accountPrivacy.marketingDescription: Receive marketing email from Valbri. Service and security messages are unaffected.
accountPrivacy.loadFailed: Unable to load the privacy center.
accountPrivacy.conflict: These choices changed on another device. The newest server choices have been loaded; review them and explicitly confirm before saving again.
accountPrivacy.recentRequestsDescription: The three most recent requests linked to this account.
accountPrivacy.deletionDescription: Start an erasure request. Identity verification and administrator approval are required before any deletion is executed.

cookieConsent.title: Browser storage choices
cookieConsent.description: Necessary storage stays active. Preferences and functional storage are optional and off until you choose.
cookieConsent.settingsDescription: Choose the optional categories this browser may store. You can return here and withdraw them at any time.
cookieConsent.necessaryDescription: Authentication, security, checkout and an active support session.
cookieConsent.preferencesDescription: Language and interface choices on this device.
cookieConsent.functionalDescription: Anonymous review voting and related device-local features.
cookieConsent.analyticsDescription: Valbri does not use analytics storage.
cookieConsent.advertisingDescription: Valbri does not use advertising or data-sharing storage.
cookieConsent.syncFailed: Browser choices were saved locally, but account synchronization failed.
cookieConsent.syncConflict: These choices changed on another device. The newest account choices were loaded; review and confirm before saving again.

home.tagline: Encrypted end to end. Delivered fast. Engineered to keep your account safe — from checkout to coins in hand, every step stays clear and rock-solid.

howToBuy.title: How to buy
howToBuy.subtitle: Here are the detailed steps for purchasing FC 26 Coins on Valbri.
howToBuy.step1: On the Valbri home page, choose your preferred language.
howToBuy.step2: Sign in to your Valbri account, or create a new one if you don't have it yet.
howToBuy.step3: Click "Shop Packages" on the home page to enter the FC 26 Coins page.
howToBuy.step4: Pick your platform — PS/Xbox or PC.
howToBuy.step5: Choose the FC coin bundle you want and adjust the quantity.
howToBuy.step6: Tap "Checkout", select your preferred payment method (Stripe / PayPal), and complete payment.
howToBuy.step7: Submit the required game account info and wait for our manual delivery.

precautions.title: Before you buy
precautions.subtitle: Please read and confirm the following before placing your order — it makes delivery smoother and keeps your account safer.

item1.title: Unlock the Transfer Market
item1.desc: Before continuing, please make sure you've unlocked the Transfer Market in FUT Web or the Companion App.

item2.title: Minimum Coin Requirement
item2.desc: Please make sure you have at least 1,000 FC Coins in-game as starting capital. The more coins on the account, the faster and safer the delivery. If you don't have enough FC 26 Coins, please acquire them first.

item3.title: Avoid Cross-Platform Buying
item3.desc: Within 24 hours before and 48 hours after a Valbri transaction, please avoid buying FC 26 Coins from other platforms to reduce the risk of being banned.

item5.title: Post-Trade Security
item5.desc: After a successful trade, please change your account password immediately and remove any unrecognized trusted devices to harden your account.

guarantee.title: Service guarantee
guarantee.subtitle: From checkout to coins in hand, we've got you covered.

noFee.title: No 5% Fee
noFee.desc: Skip the 5% EA transfer fee — every coin you buy lands in your wallet.

fastDelivery.title: Safe & Fast Delivery
fastDelivery.desc: Coins are sourced through manual in-game runs — the supply chain stays clean and reliable.

afterSale.title: After-Sales Review
afterSale.desc: Report a verified delivery issue to support. Eligible remedies are assessed under the refund terms that applied to your order.

warranty7d.title: Delivery Issue Support
warranty7d.desc: We review reported delivery issues using the order record, fulfilment evidence and the applicable refund policy.

whyUs.title: Why pick Valbri?
whyUs.subtitle: Every delivery is engineered with the care of a software craftsman.

secure.title: Protected Transactions
secure.desc: We use access controls, encrypted transport and established payment providers to reduce transaction and data risk.

support.title: Customer Support
support.desc: Contact our support team before, during or after a purchase. Response times vary with request volume and complexity.

refund.title: Refund Eligibility Review
refund.desc: If an order is not delivered, is only partly delivered or cannot be used, contact support for review under the applicable refund terms.

closing.title: Ready to start your FC 26 journey?
closing.subtitle: Pick a package, complete payment, and follow the order's estimated delivery status.

home.badge: FC26 packages live — Stripe & PayPal available
home.title: FC26 Ultimate Team Coins —
home.description: Valbri is a player-facing digital game fulfilment service focused on FC26 coins and selected game services. Checkout supports Stripe and PayPal, with delivery estimates shown for each order.
home.paymentNotice: Check out with Stripe or PayPal and follow the estimated delivery status on your order.
home.gamesDesc: We currently focus on FC26, and also support the following games.

security.title: After-Sales Review
security.desc: Contact support if a delivery issue arises. Eligibility is reviewed under the refund terms that applied to the order.

delivery.title: Fast Delivery
delivery.desc: Once payment is confirmed, coins will be delivered to your account within the estimated time shown.

payment.title: Secure Payment
payment.desc: Stripe and PayPal process payment credentials through their hosted payment flows. Valbri does not store complete card numbers.

privacy.title: Privacy Protection
privacy.desc: We protect personal and transaction data and share it only with necessary processors or where law requires. We do not sell personal information.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.description: Pay with Stripe or PayPal — your coins are delivered within minutes after payment is confirmed.

cart.title: Cart
cart.subtitle: Review selected packages and submit orders one by one with the current business flow.
cart.empty: Your cart is empty. Pick an FC26 package to get started.
cart.summaryHint: The cart only stores selections temporarily. Please checkout one package at a time; final price, coins, and platform availability are revalidated at checkout.
cart.flowHint: Tap Checkout on any row to place that order

about.title: About Valbri
about.description1: Valbri is an online gaming marketplace focused on FC26 Ultimate Team coins and selected game services. Our goal is to provide fast, reliable, and user-friendly delivery with transparent pricing.
about.description2: This website is currently operating in MVP mode. Payments are disabled, and a bank payment gateway will be integrated after the website is finalized and approved.
about.notice: Company details and legal information will be added during the final launch phase.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: For business inquiries, support, or partnership requests, please contact us using the information below.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to Valbri. By accessing or using this website, you agree to be bound by the following terms and conditions.

serviceScope.title: Service Scope
serviceScope.content: Valbri operates as a gaming marketplace focused on FC26 Ultimate Team coins and selected game-related services. This website is currently operating in MVP mode.

payments.title: Payments
payments.content: Payments are currently disabled. A bank payment gateway will be integrated after the website is finalized and approved.

userResponsibilities.title: User Responsibilities
userResponsibilities.content: Users are responsible for providing accurate information when submitting orders and must not share unnecessary or sensitive account details.

changes.title: Changes
changes.content: Valbri reserves the right to update or modify these terms at any time.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: In this section, we provide you with essential information about our line of work and our Privacy Policy. A privacy policy is a legal document that explains how your website collects, uses, and protects personal information.
privacy.content: Here, at the first step, you will receive necessary data about how we collect and use your personal data to give you efficient services. In order to have accurate knowledge about data protection, please read our complete Privacy Policy.

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.content: During the MVP phase, we may collect basic contact information such as name and email address when users submit an order or inquiry.

use.title: Use of Information
use.content: Collected information is used solely for communication, order processing, and service improvement purposes.

security.title: Payments & Security
security.content: No payment information is collected at this stage. Secure bank payment processing will be introduced after approval.

sharing.title: Data Sharing
sharing.content: Valbri does not sell or share personal data with third parties.

backupCodes.title: How to get FC 26 backup codes
backupCodes.subtitle: To ensure smooth delivery, please fetch your backup codes from the EA Account Center.
backupCodes.step1: Sign in to EA Account Center and click "Security and Privacy" on the left.
backupCodes.step2: Scroll down on the Security and privacy page to see password and ad settings.
backupCodes.step4: Click the > button on the right side of that section.
backupCodes.step5: Click "View backup codes" on the detail page.
backupCodes.step6: Click "Create new code" to generate a fresh set of backup codes.
backupCodes.step7: Copy all the backup codes and keep them somewhere safe — you'll need them when placing your order.
backupCodes.footnote: FC 26 coin delivery is performed manually to reduce operational and account risk.
backupCodes.shot1: Open "Security and Privacy", then scroll down
backupCodes.shot3: On the detail page click "View backup codes"
backupCodes.shot4: Click "Create new code" and copy them all
backupCodes.closeHint: When you're done, go back to the previous tab to finish entering your EA account info.
